title: User Feedback Sentiment Triage
shortDescription: Classify feedback sentiment and surface actionable themes.

inputs.label: Feedback List
inputs.example: ['Love the new update!', 'The app crashes every time I open settings.', 'Great customer service, very responsive.', 'Not intuitive to use at all.', 'Fast and reliable, best tool we have used.', 'Billing page is confusing and I was charged twice.']
